Package net.minheur.potoflux.settings.types

Class CheckboxSetting

java.lang.Object
net.minheur.potoflux.settings.types.CheckboxSetting
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISettingType<Boolean>
public class CheckboxSetting extends Object implements ISettingType<Boolean>
A setting that uses a checkbox, featuring a true / false switch
